_inputs.jd_text:
HR Business Partner — Tech & Product Teams
Company: Nexus Technologies (SaaS, 800-person company)
Location: Bengaluru / Hybrid

About the Role
We are looking for an HRBP to support our Engineering, Product, and Design teams (300+ employees). You will be a strategic partner to people managers, drive talent programs, and ensure our HR operations and compliance are excellent.

Responsibilities
- Partner with Engineering and Product leadership to support org design, workforce planning, and talent strategy
- Manage end-to-end employee lifecycle: onboarding, performance management, disciplinary actions, separations
- Advise managers on employee relations issues, applying relevant employment law and company policy
- Drive HR programs: performance review cycles, engagement surveys, learning & development initiatives
- Manage full-cycle recruiting for senior and niche roles in partnership with the Talent Acquisition team
- Oversee payroll inputs and benefits administration for supported functions
- Analyse HR metrics (attrition, headcount, time-to-fill) and present insights to leadership
- Ensure compliance with local labour laws and statutory requirements (PF, ESIC, Gratuity, Shops & Establishments Act)

Requirements
- 5+ years of HR experience with at least 2 years in an HRBP or HR Generalist role supporting tech teams
- Strong knowledge of employee relations, performance management, and HR compliance
- Experience managing benefits administration and payroll coordination
- Hands-on experience with HRIS platforms (Workday, Darwinbox, Keka, or SAP SuccessFactors)
- Ability to manage multiple stakeholders and balance strategic and operational HR
- Excellent interpersonal and communication skills; high degree of confidentiality
- Data-driven: comfortable building and presenting HR dashboards and headcount reports

Nice to Have
- MBA in HR or equivalent postgraduate degree
- Experience supporting a high-growth tech company
- Familiarity with Agile team structures and engineering culture
- SHRM-CP or equivalent certification
_inputs.resume_text:
Priya Nair
HR Recruiter

SUMMARY
Driven recruiter with 4+ years of experience in end-to-end talent acquisition, including engineering, technical, and university recruitment. Experienced in sourcing passive candidates, managing ATS, and building campus relationships.

ACCOMPLISHMENTS
- Recruited 122 engineers in 6 months, growing an engineering team from 8 to 130 employees
- Promoted from Recruiter to Senior Recruiter within 2 years

EXPERIENCE

HR Intern / Human Resources Assistant
US Company | February 2016 – Present
- Created job postings and connected with university students for campus recruitment programs
- Tracked key recruitment dates and maintained personnel lists in ATS
- Conducted job analysis and job evaluations, producing quality job specifications
- Managed employee information systems and gathered personnel records from all departments

Senior Recruiter
Magnasoft | India | January 2011 – January 2015
- Managed end-to-end recruitment: sourcing, screening, reference checks, negotiation, and offer generation
- Sourced passive candidates using LinkedIn X-Ray search, Boolean searches, GitHub, and Tech Fetch
- Led creation of recruiting plans for all open positions; developed salary proposals
- Partnered with local universities for campus engagement and job fairs
- Hired C-level candidates through targeted passive sourcing campaigns

EDUCATION
MBA, Human Resources — University (India, 2011)
B.Sc., Biotechnology — Mount Carmel College, India (2009)
Human Resources Management (ongoing) — University of Washington

SKILLS
LinkedIn Recruiter, Boolean Search, Bullhorn ATS, Monster, Indeed, CareerBuilder, Campus Recruitment, Technical Recruiting, Salary Negotiation, Workforce Planning

_inputs.jd_text:
Backend Software Engineer — Payments Platform
Company: TransactIQ (Fintech startup, Series B)
Location: Bengaluru / Remote

About the Role
We are looking for a Backend Engineer to build and scale the core payments infrastructure. You will design high-throughput services, own API contracts, and contribute to the reliability and performance of systems processing 5M+ transactions/day.

Responsibilities
- Design, build, and maintain RESTful microservices in Java (Spring Boot) or Python (FastAPI/Django)
- Build and consume event-driven systems using Kafka or equivalent message brokers
- Own API design, versioning, and documentation for internal and external consumers
- Write performant SQL and work with relational databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL)
- Implement caching strategies (Redis) to improve latency and reduce DB load
- Participate in on-call rotations; maintain service SLAs and contribute to incident postmortems
- Write unit and integration tests targeting ≥ 80% code coverage
- Collaborate with DevOps on CI/CD pipelines, Docker containerisation, and cloud deployments (AWS)

Requirements
- 4+ years of backend engineering experience
- Strong proficiency in Java (Spring Boot) or Python (FastAPI or Django)
- Experience with microservices architecture and event-driven design (Kafka preferred)
- Solid SQL skills; experience with PostgreSQL or MySQL in production
- Familiarity with Redis or other caching layers
- Experience with Docker and basic cloud services (AWS EC2, S3, RDS)
- Strong understanding of REST API design principles
- Comfortable with Git, code review, and Agile development practices

Nice to Have
- Experience in fintech or payments domain
- Exposure to Kubernetes or container orchestration
- Knowledge of distributed tracing tools (Jaeger, Zipkin)
- Contributions to open-source projects

_inputs.jd_text:
Senior DevOps / Platform Engineer
Company: CloudLayer (Cloud infrastructure SaaS, Series A)
Location: Bengaluru / Remote

About the Role
We are looking for a Senior DevOps / Platform Engineer to build and operate the cloud-native infrastructure that powers our SaaS product. You will own our Kubernetes platform, CI/CD pipelines, observability stack, and infrastructure-as-code posture.

Responsibilities
- Design and operate Kubernetes-based container orchestration on AWS EKS or GCP GKE
- Build and maintain GitOps-based deployment pipelines using ArgoCD or Flux
- Write and maintain Terraform modules for infrastructure-as-code across multiple environments and regions
- Set up and maintain observability stack: metrics (Prometheus/Grafana), logging (ELK or Loki), distributed tracing
- Drive cloud cost optimisation: right-sizing, reserved instances, spot usage strategies
- Define and enforce security best practices: IAM policies, network segmentation, secrets management (Vault)
- Respond to production incidents; conduct postmortems and drive reliability improvements
- Mentor junior DevOps engineers; establish team standards for documentation and runbooks

Requirements
- 5+ years of DevOps or platform engineering experience
- Deep expertise in Kubernetes (CKA preferred) and container orchestration at scale
- Strong infrastructure-as-code skills with Terraform
- Hands-on experience with AWS (EKS, EC2, S3, RDS, IAM, CloudFormation) or GCP equivalent
- Experience building GitOps workflows (ArgoCD, Flux)
- Proficiency in Linux, shell scripting, and Python for automation
- Experience with CI/CD tools (Jenkins, GitHub Actions, or GitLab CI)
- Solid observability experience (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK stack)

Nice to Have
- AWS Solutions Architect or CKA certification
- Experience with service mesh (Istio or Linkerd)
- Familiarity with HashiCorp Vault for secrets management
- Prior experience at a SaaS or cloud-native company
_inputs.resume_text:
Siddharth Kulkarni
siddharth.kulkarni@email.com | Hyderabad | +91-9800234567

CORE COMPETENCIES
CI/CD | Jenkins | Git | Bitbucket | Ansible | Docker | Linux | Shell Scripting | Maven | ANT | Continuous Integration | SDLC | Software Testing Life Cycle | Documentation

IT SKILLS
Primary: DevOps methodologies, CI/CD pipeline design
Languages: Core Java, Shell Script, Python (basic)
Version Control: Git, Bitbucket
Build Tools: ANT, Maven
CI/CD: Jenkins
Config Management: Ansible
App Servers: Apache Tomcat

EXPERIENCE

DevOps Engineer
Nendrasys Technologies | Hyderabad | June 2017 – Present
- Designed and maintained CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins, Maven, and Ansible for 12 microservices
- Automated infrastructure provisioning using Ansible playbooks, reducing manual setup time by 70%
- Managed Git branching strategy (Gitflow) and enforced code review policies via Bitbucket pull requests
- Configured and maintained Apache Tomcat application servers in production and staging environments
- Produced deployment documentation and runbooks; conducted onboarding sessions for junior team members
- Collaborated with development teams to resolve build failures and deployment issues within 2-hour SLA

EDUCATION
M.Sc., Information Technology — JNTU, Hyderabad (2015–2017)
B.Sc., Computer Science — Osmania University (2012–2015)

_inputs.jd_text:
Senior Product Manager — B2B SaaS Platform
Company: ScaleOps (Series B, 200-person enterprise SaaS startup)
Location: Bengaluru / Remote

About the Role
We are looking for a Senior Product Manager to own the roadmap for our core workflow automation platform used by 500+ enterprise customers. You will work closely with engineering, design, sales, and customer success to define, ship, and iterate on product that drives measurable business outcomes.

Responsibilities
- Own end-to-end product roadmap for one or more product areas with full P&L accountability
- Drive discovery: customer interviews, data analysis, market research, competitive benchmarking
- Write crisp PRDs, user stories, and acceptance criteria; maintain a well-groomed backlog
- Partner with engineering leads to scope, estimate, and deliver features on a predictable release cadence
- Define and track success metrics (activation, retention, NPS, revenue impact) for every initiative
- Present roadmap and strategy to executive leadership and key enterprise customers
- Align cross-functional stakeholders across Sales, CS, Marketing, and Legal

Requirements
- 6+ years of product management experience, with at least 3 years in B2B SaaS
- Demonstrated track record of shipping 0-to-1 products and iterating on mature platforms
- Strong data skills: comfortable with SQL, product analytics tools (Mixpanel, Amplitude, or equivalent)
- Experience running A/B experiments and making data-driven decisions
- Excellent written and verbal communication; ability to write clear PRDs and present to executives
- Experience working in Agile/Scrum environments with cross-functional teams
- Familiarity with OKR frameworks and product strategy development

Nice to Have
- Experience with workflow automation, ITSM, or enterprise integration products
- MBA or equivalent advanced degree
- Prior experience in a high-growth startup (Series A–C)
- Familiarity with JIRA, Confluence, Figma

Sneha Patil
sneha.patil@email.com | Mumbai, Maharashtra | +91-9867543210

SUMMARY
Business Analyst at Fino Payments Bank with 3 years of experience in requirement gathering, BRD creation, and stakeholder management in the fintech and payments domain.

EXPERIENCE

Business Analyst
Fino Payments Bank | Mumbai | August 2019 – Present
- Conducted in-depth requirement gathering from Business SMEs, Technical Architects, and Business Architects to produce Business Requirement Documents (BRDs)
- Created Functional Specification Documents (FSDs) outlining technical implementation and use cases
- Led Merchant Commission project end-to-end: gathered requirements, coordinated with development, managed UAT cycles
- Collaborated with compliance team to map regulatory requirements into system workflows for RBI-mandated KYC flows
- Facilitated sprint ceremonies and maintained JIRA backlog for 2 product squads

EDUCATION
B.E., Computer Science — Mumbai University (2019)
HSC — Maharashtra State Board (2015)

SKILLS
Requirement Gathering, BRD, FSD, JIRA, Agile/Scrum, SQL, MS Visio, MS Excel, Stakeholder Management, UAT, Payments Domain

section_gaps.original_content:
Business Analyst
Fino Payments Bank | Mumbai | August 2019 – Present
- Conducted in-depth requirement gathering from Business SMEs, Technical Architects, and Business Architects to produce Business Requirement Documents (BRDs)
- Created Functional Specification Documents (FSDs) outlining technical implementation and use cases
- Led Merchant Commission project end-to-end: gathered requirements, coordinated with development, managed UAT cycles
- Collaborated with compliance team to map regulatory requirements into system workflows for RBI-mandated KYC flows
- Facilitated sprint ceremonies and maintained JIRA backlog for 2 product squads

_inputs.jd_text:
Senior Product Manager — B2B SaaS Platform
Company: ScaleOps (Series B, 200-person enterprise SaaS startup)
Location: Bengaluru / Remote

About the Role
We are looking for a Senior Product Manager to own the roadmap for our core workflow automation platform used by 500+ enterprise customers. You will work closely with engineering, design, sales, and customer success to define, ship, and iterate on product that drives measurable business outcomes.

Responsibilities
- Own end-to-end product roadmap for one or more product areas with full P&L accountability
- Drive discovery: customer interviews, data analysis, market research, competitive benchmarking
- Write crisp PRDs, user stories, and acceptance criteria; maintain a well-groomed backlog
- Partner with engineering leads to scope, estimate, and deliver features on a predictable release cadence
- Define and track success metrics (activation, retention, NPS, revenue impact) for every initiative
- Present roadmap and strategy to executive leadership and key enterprise customers
- Align cross-functional stakeholders across Sales, CS, Marketing, and Legal

Requirements
- 6+ years of product management experience, with at least 3 years in B2B SaaS
- Demonstrated track record of shipping 0-to-1 products and iterating on mature platforms
- Strong data skills: comfortable with SQL, product analytics tools (Mixpanel, Amplitude, or equivalent)
- Experience running A/B experiments and making data-driven decisions
- Excellent written and verbal communication; ability to write clear PRDs and present to executives
- Experience working in Agile/Scrum environments with cross-functional teams
- Familiarity with OKR frameworks and product strategy development

Nice to Have
- Experience with workflow automation, ITSM, or enterprise integration products
- MBA or equivalent advanced degree
- Prior experience in a high-growth startup (Series A–C)
- Familiarity with JIRA, Confluence, Figma
_inputs.resume_text:
Vikram Rao
vikram.rao@email.com | +91-9845098765 | Bengaluru

CORE COMPETENCIES
Project Management Documentation | Report Automation | Dashboard Preparation | Risk Forecasting | SDLC | PMBOK | Agile/Scrum | Stakeholder Communication | Resource Planning | Budget Tracking

EXPERIENCE

PMO Analyst
Infosys | Bengaluru | July 2018 – Present
- Maintained project management documentation including project plans, RAID logs, and status reports for a 15-project portfolio
- Automated weekly and monthly reporting dashboards using Excel and Power BI, reducing manual effort by 5 hours/week
- Tracked project budgets totaling INR 45 crore across 3 business units, flagging variances >10% to leadership
- Facilitated risk review meetings and maintained risk registers with mitigation plans for each active project
- Coordinated with 8 project managers across time zones (India, US, UK) to ensure timely submission of governance artifacts

Junior PMO Analyst
HCL Technologies | Noida | August 2016 – June 2018
- Supported project governance for a 10-project program in the BFSI vertical
- Prepared executive-level dashboards and project performance reports for monthly steering committee reviews
- Tracked milestones, deliverables, and resource utilization for ongoing projects

EDUCATION
MBA, Project Management — Amity University, Noida (2016)
B.Tech, Information Technology — NIT Kurukshetra (2014)

SKILLS
MS Project, JIRA, Confluence, Power BI, Excel, Agile, PMBOK, Risk Management, Budget Tracking, Stakeholder Reporting
